verses.1: A Psalm of David. To You, LORD, I lift up my soul.
verses.2: My God, in You I trust, Do not let me be ashamed; Do not let my enemies rejoice over me.
verses.3: Indeed, none of those who wait for You will be ashamed; Those who deal treacherously without cause will be ashamed.
verses.4: Make me know Your ways, LORD; Teach me Your paths.
verses.5: Lead me in Your truth and teach me, For You are the God of my salvation; For You I wait all the day.
verses.6: Remember, LORD, Your compassion and Your faithfulness, For they have been from of old.
verses.7: Do not remember the sins of my youth or my wrongdoings; Remember me according to Your faithfulness, For Your goodness’ sake, LORD.
verses.8: The LORD is good and upright; Therefore He instructs sinners in the way.
verses.9: He leads the humble in justice, And He teaches the humble His way.
verses.10: All the paths of the LORD are faithfulness and truth To those who comply with His covenant and His testimonies.
verses.11: For the sake of Your name, LORD, Forgive my wrongdoing, for it is great.
verses.12: Who is the person who fears the LORD? He will instruct him in the way he should choose.
verses.13: His soul will dwell in prosperity, And his descendants will inherit the land.
verses.14: The secret of the LORD is for those who fear Him, And He will make them know His covenant.
verses.15: My eyes are continually toward the LORD, For He will rescue my feet from the net.
verses.16: Turn to me and be gracious to me, For I am lonely and afflicted.
verses.17: The troubles of my heart are enlarged; Bring me out of my distresses.
verses.18: Look at my misery and my trouble, And forgive all my sins.
verses.19: Look at my enemies, for they are many, And they hate me with violent hatred.
verses.20: Guard my soul and save me; Do not let me be ashamed, for I take refuge in You.
verses.21: Let integrity and uprightness protect me, For I wait for You.
verses.22: Redeem Israel, God, From all his distress.
